name: Bruschetta Romana Piccante (Spicy Roman Bruschetta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the red wine vinegar and olive oil.
2. Stir in the parsley and basil.
3. Add the minced garlic and red pepper flakes.
4. Let the mixture sit for 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
5. If needed, stir in the fresh breadcrumbs until desired consistency is reached.
6. Grill or toast bread slices until lightly charred.
7. Brush warm bread with a little olive oil.
8. Spread the bruschetta topping evenly on the bread and serve.
